videoSnippet.title: Brilliancy From the Unknown || Jan-Krzysztof Duda vs Matthias Blübaum || Titled Tuesday 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Duda, Jan-Krzysztof (3309) - Bluebaum, Matthias (3230)
Titled Tuesday Grand Prix 2025-2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.04.28
A01 Nimzovich-Larsen attack, classical variation

1.b3 d5 2.Bb2 e6 3.d3 Nf6 4.Nd2 a5 5.a3 a4 6.b4 c5 7.bxc5 Bxc5 8.e3 Nc6 9.Ngf3 O-O 10.Be2 Bd6 11.c4 dxc4 12.Nxc4 Bc7 13.O-O b5 14.Ncd2 Bb7 15.Rc1 Qe7 16.Bxf6 gxf6 17.d4 b4 18.Ne4 bxa3 19.Nc5 Bd6 20.Nxb7 Qxb7 21.d5 Nb4 22.dxe6 Rfd8 23.exf7+ Kxf7 24.Nd4 Kg8 25.Bf3 Qa6 26.Bxa8 Qxa8 27.Qg4+ Kh8 28.Qh4 Be5 29.Rc7 Bxc7 30.Qxf6+ Kg8 31.Nf5 Bxh2+ 32.Kxh2 Qb8+ 33.f4
